FROM ozycs 
ORDER BY ozycs.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT ozycs.sid,ozycs.company_name 
FROM ozycs 
WHERE (ozycs.cs_id=[样品入库管理.入库详情.厂家ID]) 
ORDER BY ozycs.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT ypgl.sid 
FROM ypgl 
WHERE (ypgl.lxm=[样品入库管理.入库详情.条 形 码]) 
ORDER BY ypgl.sid ASC

actions.expression:
select 
  rid,
  cpbh,
  zwpm,
  sccj1,
  cjID1,
  [样品入库管理.人    员] as ry,
  [样品入库管理.样品来源] as laiy
  from ypgl 
  where (lxm=[样品入库管理.入库详情.条 形 码])
actions.caption: 调入样品管理入库信息

caption: 样品入库管理

view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%外销%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%跟单%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

客人要样
采购推荐
业务还样

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   ((ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%外销%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%跟单%")) and (ywrybiao.zt not like "%离职%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC
